title: Erode collector reviews counting hall layout; recount protocols issued
summary: The Erode District Collector inspected counting hall arrangements at all eight Assembly constituencies and issued fresh protocols on recount procedures, video recording requirements and party-agent rotation schedules.

title: Turmeric prices firm up at Erode Regulated Market amid tight arrivals
summary: Turmeric prices at the Erode Regulated Market climbed by Rs 800 per quintal this week as arrivals from Sathyamangalam and Bhavani belts thinned. Traders expect the firm trend to continue into mid-May.

title: DMK and AIADMK booth agents undergo Form 17C reconciliation drill
summary: Booth-level agents from both major Dravidian parties attended a joint training session on Form 17C tally reconciliation, postal-ballot handling and the new VVPAT slip-counting protocol introduced this election.

title: Bhavanisagar dam reaches 78 percent capacity after early rains
summary: Inflows from the Western Ghats catchment have pushed the Bhavanisagar dam to 78 percent of its full capacity, with PWD officials confirming additional discharge to the LBP canal will begin Sunday.

title: Sathyamangalam tiger reserve records highest big-cat count in five years
summary: The latest camera-trap census at Sathyamangalam Tiger Reserve has documented 102 individual tigers, the highest count since the reserve was notified, signalling strong corridor recovery with adjacent Bandipur.

title: Erode silver anklet exporters report record April shipments
summary: Erode's traditional silver anklet cluster reported its highest-ever single-month export volume in April, driven by Gulf and Singapore demand. Exporters expect continued growth in Q1 FY27.

title: Kongu Engineering College convocation honours 1,908 graduates
summary: Perundurai's Kongu Engineering College conferred degrees on 1,908 graduates including 315 postgraduates at its 38th convocation, with MeitY Secretary S Krishnan presenting medals to 118 toppers.

title: Erode-Karur four-lane highway upgrade work to begin in June
summary: NHAI has awarded the contract for upgrading the 78-km Erode-Karur stretch into a fully access-controlled four-lane highway, with construction set to begin in the first week of June.

title: Heavy rain forecast for Erode; Bhavani river sandbar erosion warning
summary: IMD has placed Erode under a yellow rain warning for the next 48 hours. The Water Resources Department warned of sandbar erosion along the Bhavani river near Lower Bhavani sub-basin villages.

title: Gobichettipalayam handloom co-op revives traditional 80-count weave
summary: The Gobichettipalayam Handloom Cooperative has restarted production of its signature 80-count cotton weave after a decade, with state textile department support and a buy-back guarantee from Co-optex.

title: Erode Govt Medical College adds 50 PG seats from next academic year
summary: Erode Government Medical College and Hospital has received NMC approval for 50 additional postgraduate seats spread across general medicine, surgery, paediatrics and radiology, beginning the 2026-27 batch.

title: Chennimalai weavers protest yarn price hike outside collectorate
summary: Around 300 powerloom weavers from Chennimalai gathered outside the Erode Collectorate demanding rollback of the recent yarn price hike, which they say has rendered domestic order pricing unviable.

title: Erode municipal corporation launches QR-coded property tax receipts
summary: Erode Corporation has rolled out QR-enabled digital property tax receipts allowing residents to verify payment status, dues and earlier transactions through a single scan from May 1.
